goal: Demonstrate the teach-pendant workflow in Isaac Sim: start teaching mode on a Franka Panda, capture 6 named waypoints that trace a pick-to-place arc over a table surface, interpolate a smooth dense trajectory between them, save the trajectory to workspace/trajectories/teach_demo.json, then replay it at 0.5× speed to verify the path. No physics delivery gate; success criterion is a completed replay with no IK failures reported in console. Exercises start_teaching_mode (mode='drag_target'), teach_robot_pose ×6, record_waypoints, interpolate_trajectory (method='cubic'), and replay_trajectory.
thoughts:
Design rationale for CP-NEW-teaching-mode-pose-replay:

1) Pattern novelty: no canonical in A1-A20 exercises the teach-pendant / waypoint-capture / trajectory-replay triad. This canonical validates that start_teaching_mode → teach_robot_pose → record_waypoints → interpolate_trajectory → replay_trajectory chain works end-to-end.

2) Waypoint geometry: Franka at origin on table (z=0.75). 6 waypoints trace a smooth pick-to-place arc:
   home    → robot fully upright, all joints near 0
   above_source → EE above source cube at [0.40, 0.20, 1.05]
   pick    → EE lowered to grasp height [0.40, 0.20, 0.85]
   lift    → EE raised [0.40, 0.20, 1.10]
   place   → EE above drop zone [0.00, -0.45, 1.05]
   drop    → EE lowered to release height [0.00, -0.45, 0.85]
   All positions within Franka 0.85m reach envelope.

3) teach_robot_pose captures the current joint config after teleporting EE to each target. In direct-eval context, EE positions are set via set_joint_targets to approximate the desired configuration; this is the standard sim teaching workflow without a real drag-target UI.

4) record_waypoints(format='json') writes to workspace/trajectories/teach_demo.json. interpolate_trajectory(method='cubic') produces smooth dense trajectory (50 steps between pairs → 300 steps total). replay_trajectory(speed=0.5) plays back at half speed for visual inspection.

5) Physics: CPU dynamics, minimal scene. Ground plane + work table. No rigid-body parts (waypoint capture does not require them).

6) get_console_errors(last_n=5) at the end: any IK failure or joint-limit violation surfaces here. Template treats 0 errors as pass criterion.

7) motion_controller_preference: direct_joint. start_teaching_mode uses mode='drag_target' with RMPflow tracking internally, but the orchestration is joint-space waypoints, not cuRobo plan_pose. No cuRobo dependency.
code:
# ── Scene skeleton ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.5, 0.4, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Physics scene: CPU dynamics ───────────────────────────────────────────────
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# ── Franka Panda robot ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

# ── Start simulation so physics and articulation settle ───────────────────────
sim_control(action="play")
sim_control(action="step", step_count=30)

# ── Activate teaching mode (drag_target with RMPflow EE tracking) ─────────────
start_teaching_mode(
    articulation_path="/World/Franka",
    mode="drag_target",
    robot_type="franka",
)

# ── Capture 6 waypoints along pick-to-place arc ───────────────────────────────
# In simulation teaching context, each teach_robot_pose snapshot captures
# the current joint configuration after the operator (or scripted EE move)
# positions the robot.

# Waypoint 1: home — robot upright, EE centred above table
teach_robot_pose(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    pose_name="home",
)

# Waypoint 2: above_source — EE above source location [0.40, 0.20, 1.05]
teach_robot_pose(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    pose_name="above_source",
)

# Waypoint 3: pick — EE lowered to grasp height [0.40, 0.20, 0.85]
teach_robot_pose(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    pose_name="pick",
)

# Waypoint 4: lift — EE raised after grasp [0.40, 0.20, 1.10]
teach_robot_pose(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    pose_name="lift",
)

# Waypoint 5: place — EE over drop zone [0.00, -0.45, 1.05]
teach_robot_pose(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    pose_name="place",
)

# Waypoint 6: drop — EE lowered to release height [0.00, -0.45, 0.85]
teach_robot_pose(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    pose_name="drop",
)

# ── Save sparse waypoints to JSON ─────────────────────────────────────────────
record_waypoints(
    articulation_path="/World/Franka",
    output_path="workspace/trajectories/teach_demo.json",
    format="json",
)

# ── Interpolate to smooth dense trajectory (cubic spline, 50 steps/segment) ──
interpolate_trajectory(
    articulation_path="/World/Franka",
    waypoints=[
        {"pose_name": "home"},
        {"pose_name": "above_source"},
        {"pose_name": "pick"},
        {"pose_name": "lift"},
        {"pose_name": "place"},
        {"pose_name": "drop"},
    ],
    method="cubic",
    num_steps=50,
    output_path="workspace/trajectories/teach_demo_dense.json",
    robot_type="franka",
)

# ── Replay dense trajectory at half speed ─────────────────────────────────────
replay_trajectory(
    articulation_path="/World/Franka",
    trajectory_path="workspace/trajectories/teach_demo_dense.json",
    speed=0.5,
)

# ── Verify: check for IK / joint-limit errors ─────────────────────────────────
get_console_errors(last_n=5, min_level="error")
failure_modes: teach_robot_pose requires simulation playing — if sim is paused when called, joint snapshot returns zero-config. Ensure sim_control(action='play') precedes all teach_robot_pose calls.

interpolate_trajectory with pose_name waypoint dicts requires that teach_robot_pose already wrote pose files to workspace/robot_poses/Franka/. If the directory is missing, create it manually or pass explicit joint_positions lists instead.
record_waypoints output_path directory must exist — create workspace/trajectories/ beforehand or the write will fail with FileNotFoundError.
replay_trajectory at speed=0.5 on a 300-step trajectory takes ~60 sim seconds; if the caller has a short timeout, raise speed to 1.0.

cubic interpolation near Franka wrist singularities (joints 4+6 near ±pi) can produce large joint swings between waypoints. Add an extra via-waypoint at the midpoint of the swing segment if large oscillations appear.

waypoints.note: 6 named poses: home, above_source, pick, lift, place, drop

code_template:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.5, 0.4, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)
sim_control(action="play")
sim_control(action="step", step_count=30)
start_teaching_mode(
    articulation_path="/World/Franka",
    mode="drag_target",
    robot_type="franka",
)
for wp in ["home", "above_source", "pick", "lift", "place", "drop"]:
    teach_robot_pose(robot_path="/World/Franka", pose_name=wp)
record_waypoints(
    articulation_path="/World/Franka",
    output_path="workspace/trajectories/teach_demo.json",
    format="json",
)
interpolate_trajectory(
    articulation_path="/World/Franka",
    waypoints=[{"pose_name": wp} for wp in ["home", "above_source", "pick", "lift", "place", "drop"]],
    method="cubic",
    num_steps=50,
    output_path="workspace/trajectories/teach_demo_dense.json",
    robot_type="franka",
)
replay_trajectory(
    articulation_path="/World/Franka",
    trajectory_path="workspace/trajectories/teach_demo_dense.json",
    speed=0.5,
)
get_console_errors(last_n=5, min_level="error")
